name: Fresh Strawberry Smoothies-New Orleans Jazz & Heritage
recipeIngredient: 30 Fresh medium-sized strawberries, hulled and washed well.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Vitamix machine or blender, add the strawberries, honey, and water.
2. Blend at high speed while gradually adding crushed ice until reaching the desired consistency.
3. The smoothie should be thick enough to hold a straw but still pourable.
4. This recipe yields 4 to 5 servings of approximately 8 ounces each.
